hero_desc: A parent company building a portfolio of ventures that unlock a new asset class — trusted, technology-enabled human experiences. Backed by evidence-based governance and shared infrastructure designed for scalable enterprise value.
about_desc: The global market for human experiences — creative services, dining, care coordination, and education — is fragmented, trust-deficient, and underserved by technology. LifeGex eliminates the inefficiency by building a parent company that systematically identifies, validates, and scales ventures across these verticals using shared infrastructure, evidence-based capital allocation, and stage-gated governance.
about_c1_d: Instead of betting on one app, LifeGex distributes risk across four validated ventures — each targeting a distinct multi-billion dollar experience market — while sharing one operating system.
about_c2_d: Shared modules — identity, trust, reputation, matching, booking, payment, dispute, and AI concierge — get stronger with every venture added, creating data network effects that competitors cannot replicate.
about_c3_d: Every dollar is allocated by evidence, not intuition. Stage-gate validation ensures capital deploys only after paid transactions, repeat usage, and unit economics are proven — minimizing dilution risk.
val_desc: Four principles guide every decision, from venture selection to capital allocation to product design.
val1_d: Every venture is built on verified identity, transparent reputation, and reliable dispute resolution. Trust is never optional — it is the foundation.
val2_d: No decision is made on enthusiasm alone. Stage-gates, audit trails, and documented proof govern every resource allocation and strategic move.
val3_d: Technology exists to serve people, not replace them. Every system, workflow, and interface prioritizes empathy, clarity, and real human connection.
val4_d: Shared infrastructure, cross-venture learning, and reusable core modules create value that multiplies with every new venture added to the portfolio.
vent_desc: Each venture operates in a distinct real-life experience market, guided by shared parent-company discipline.
vent1_desc: A creative services marketplace connecting verified talent with vetted clients for photography, videography, music, events, and design.
vent2_desc: Decision intelligence for dining and food experiences. EatCue addresses the paradox of choice in the $3T global food service market.
vent3_desc: Coordination and trust platform for non-clinical care journeys. As the global care economy expands past $500B.
vent4_desc: AI-supported foundational learning platform targeting the $250B global tutoring and supplementary education market.
tl_1_d: LifeGex Strategic Charter established. Parent company model, governance framework, and evidence system designed.
tl_2_d: First subsidiary venture activated. Manual validation phase testing creative services marketplace dynamics.
tl_3_d: Shared core modules emerge from validated workflows. Identity, trust, booking, and payment systems built for cross-venture reuse.
tl_4_d: EatCue, CareTrip, and StudyBase progress through research gates. Capital allocated by evidence strength.
funds_desc: Investment will be deployed across four strategic areas to accelerate validation, build core infrastructure, and scale the venture portfolio.
funds1_d: Build the shared core platform modules — identity, trust, booking, payment — and launch PoseLane MVP.
funds2_d: Fund manual MVP operations for PoseLane including supply acquisition, demand generation, trust verification, and transaction processing.
funds3_d: Complete the stage-gate system, evidence tracking, audit protocols, decision rights framework, and legal structuring.
funds4_d: Build the lean parent company team — legal, finance, ops, and venture support — to manage and scale the portfolio.
team_desc: A lean team of operators, builders, and domain experts committed to building the world's first experience venture system.
cta_desc: LifeGex is opening its first funding round. Join us in building the operating system for human experiences.
exit_desc: Get updates on LifeGex ventures and investment opportunities.
footer_tag: Parent Company. Venture System. Experience OS.
